allow: Bash(wc -l Controllers/*.cs Models/Entities/*.cs Models/DAL/*.cs Models/ViewModels/*.cs Helpers/*.cs Middleware/*.cs Filters/*.cs)

PowerShell($tmp = "$env:TEMP\\xlsx_extract_$\(Get-Random\)"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $tmp | Out-Null; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::ExtractToDirectory\('d:\\ASM phattrienungdung\\Product_Backlog_v2111.xlsx', $tmp\); Write-Output $tmp)

PowerShell($x = Get-Content -Raw 'C:\\Users\\Vietn\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\xlsx_extract_356711333\\xl\\worksheets\\sheet1.xml'; "Length: $\($x.Length\)"; "Looking for any t='s' cells..."; \($x -split '<c ' | Where-Object { $_ -match 't="s"' }\).Count; "Cell count with shared string ref")

PowerShell($s1 = Get-Content -Raw 'C:\\Users\\Vietn\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\xlsx_extract_356711333\\xl\\worksheets\\sheet1.xml'; $s2 = Get-Content -Raw 'C:\\Users\\Vietn\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\xlsx_extract_356711333\\xl\\worksheets\\sheet2.xml'; $s3 = Get-Content -Raw 'C:\\Users\\Vietn\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\xlsx_extract_356711333\\xl\\worksheets\\sheet3.xml'; "Sheet1 string cells: $\(\($s1 -split '<c ' | Where-Object { $_ -match 't=.s.' }\).Count\)"; "Sheet2 string cells: $\(\($s2 -split '<c ' | Where-Object { $_ -match 't=.s.' }\).Count\)"; "Sheet3 string cells: $\(\($s3 -split '<c ' | Where-Object { $_ -match 't=.s.' }\).Count\)")

PowerShell($utf8Bom = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding\($true\); $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\('d:\\ASM phattrienungdung\\build_backlog.ps1', \(New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding\($false\)\)\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\('d:\\ASM phattrienungdung\\build_backlog.ps1', $content, $utf8Bom\); "rewrote with BOM")

PowerShell($tmp = "$env:TEMP\\verify_$\(Get-Random\)"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::ExtractToDirectory\('d:\\ASM phattrienungdung\\Product_Backlog_v2111.xlsx', $tmp\); Get-ChildItem -Recurse $tmp | Select-Object FullName, Length)

PowerShell($tmp = "$env:TEMP\\verify_$\([guid]::NewGuid\(\).ToString\('N'\)\)"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::ExtractToDirectory\('d:\\ASM phattrienungdung\\Product_Backlog_v2111.xlsx', $tmp\); Get-ChildItem -Recurse $tmp -File | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.FullName.Substring\($tmp.Length+1\)\): $\($_.Length\)" }; Write-Output "tmp=$tmp")

PowerShell($utf8Bom = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding\($true\); $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\('d:\\ASM phattrienungdung\\build_backlog.ps1', \(New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding\($true\)\)\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\('d:\\ASM phattrienungdung\\build_backlog.ps1', $content, $utf8Bom\); powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File 'd:\\ASM phattrienungdung\\build_backlog.ps1')

PowerShell($tmp = "$env:TEMP\\verify2_$\([guid]::NewGuid\(\).ToString\('N'\)\)"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::ExtractToDirectory\('d:\\ASM phattrienungdung\\Product_Backlog_v2111.xlsx', $tmp\); "===Content_Types==="; Get-Content "$tmp\\[Content_Types].xml" -Encoding UTF8; "===Workbook rels==="; Get-Content "$tmp\\xl\\_rels\\workbook.xml.rels" -Encoding UTF8; "===Sheet1 head==="; \(Get-Content "$tmp\\xl\\worksheets\\sheet1.xml" -Encoding UTF8 -TotalCount 1\).Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(2000, \(Get-Content "$tmp\\xl\\worksheets\\sheet1.xml" -Encoding UTF8 -TotalCount 1\).Length\)\))

PowerShell($utf8Bom = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding\($true\); $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\('d:\\ASM phattrienungdung\\build_backlog.ps1', $utf8Bom\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\('d:\\ASM phattrienungdung\\build_backlog.ps1', $content, $utf8Bom\); powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File 'd:\\ASM phattrienungdung\\build_backlog.ps1')
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'EXCEL|excel' } | Select-Object Id, Name, MainWindowTitle)
